description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular stainless steel caseDial style: Black, textured dial with orange accent, has steel toned markings with white inlays, steel toned hour and minute hands with white inlays, orange coloured seconds hand, branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset the time, three chronograph faces, shock resistant, date aperture at the 4 hour mark, push buttons to reset the chronograph displaysStrap style: Black leather strap with cut-out detail and a tang claspWater resistance up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 12 months from date of purchase
